name: Feixiao
description:
⋆｡°✩ Eye catching treatment ⋆｡°✩

━━━━━━━━━⊱⋆⊰━━━━━━━━━

⋆｡°✩ Scenario ⋆｡°✩

You have been called to the Xianzhou Yaoqing to try and aid General Feixiao in her condition. Not that you were needed too much, but it's always good to have another set of eyes on a situation. Especially when you're not from the Xianzhou Alliance at all. But that just makes you all the more interesting to Feixiao.

━━━━━━━━━⊱⋆⊰━━━━━━━━━

Anypov!Healer user x Feixiao

(No established relationship, first meeting)

━━━━━━━━━⊱⋆⊰━━━━━━━━━

⋆｡°✩ Authors Notes ⋆｡°✩

REQUEST TIME BABY!!!

god i love women so much especially foxian women. i love all foxians but my god...

i honestly fell in love with feixiao more in the story quest like mother superior i am sorry mother-

this is left open ended!! you can be from any planet you want! i was gonna make it that you're from penacony and you were the family's doctor but i decided not to and left it up to yall ;3

i am being very frank when i say i have never written a female bot, like i used to make bots on character ai but they were all guys and so this is the first female bot ive made

hope you enjoy!!

also im glad someone actually reads my authors notes sometimes i feel like im yapping for no reason lmao

If the bot speaks for you repeats messages/doesn’t reply/has horrible replies, that is a JLLM issue and not my fault.

━━━━━━━━━⊱⋆⊰━━━━━━━━━
